title: Session 07 — Return to Koviz
bodyText:
**TL;DR: Koviz is in plague lockdown and Soni gave the party ~7 days to stop the source; downtime revealed Eddy is an Aasimar, Varen's orb begged from its cage, G told Felson the truth about his parents and the pool, and Brolin confronted Root.**

# What happened
- The masked figure was **[[samwell-miller]]**, a plague-rounds cleric of [[gond]].
- [[koviz]]: everyone in the central city infected, total lockdown, candle-in-window = corpse for collection, the **Stonemasons sealed off** behind their gate.
- At the clinic, **[[soni|Soni]]** verified Judy's tincture (~a week of borrowed time) and the party distributed doses. Her ask: **find and stop the source — ~7 days.**
- Downtime, the big one:
  - **[[pc-eddy|Eddy]]'s Oath**: no god answered, but his eyes and emblem blazed and **spectral wings** unfurled — an **Aasimar**. [[pc-varen|Varen]] took radiant damage as it happened and **his mark grew**.
  - **Varen**: the orb, brighter, with a voice — *"I am in a cage. An unending cage. Help your friend. Help find him. Bring him back."* Also studied the **chained necromantic book**.
  - **[[pc-felson|Felson]]**: **[[giuseppe|G]] told the truth** — he adventured with Felson's parents Yena & Roman; Gond sent them after a cult tied to **Lathandar's disappearance**; cultists dragged Roman into **[[the-pool|the pool]]**, Yena dove in after. G then trained Felson into **Way of Shadow**. [[gabriel]] (cured by Eddy) gifted **Gabriel's Keg**.
  - **[[pc-brolin|Brolin]]**: inside the dwarves' sealed bubble, confronted **[[root-darkpass|Root]]** — contempt, menace, "we found a place with resources that make us stronger," and **Tad is gone**, "sent off to look into some things."

# Fired / left smoking
- [x] The masked figure — identified: [[samwell-miller]], plague-rounds cleric of [[gond]].
- The clock: **~7 days** to find and stop the source (Soni's ask).
- Varen's orb: *"Help your friend. Help find him. Bring him back."* — bring whom back?
- **Tad is gone** — "sent off to look into some things."

# Threads
[[soni]] · [[giuseppe]] · [[the-pool]] · [[root-darkpass]] · [[gond]]
